name: staged-review
description: Universal three-tier code review workflow — pre-commit (code-review), pre-merge cloud-agent PR gate (commit-review), post-commit / post-merge audit (audit-review). v1.16: NEW audit-review skill — full 5+1 audit on committed code, mandatory parallel Codex dispatch, auto-applies hygiene fixes, auto-resolves discuss-design via Claude+Codex dialogue (convergence applies, divergence drops to ROADMAP), writes .audit/<sha>.md + commits as audit(...). FULLY AUTONOMOUS. Auto-invoked by worktree-workflow, linear-workflow, and commit-review's auto-merge tail. commit-review SIMPLIFIED — narrowed to pre-merge correctness gate (Cat 1 bugs + @doc/@spec drift only), AUTO-MERGES cloud-agent PRs on ✅ + green CI + 5 preconditions, then chains audit-review. Hygiene categories (extractions, TODO markers, abstractions, full doc gaps, sobelow drift) moved to audit-review post-merge. Step 15 doc-only commit replaced by audit() commit. Optional Codex CLI second-opinion removed (audit-review's mandatory parallel Codex covers it).
